settings.heading: GST-Invoiced Corporate Trophy Orders
settings.subheading: Proper GST invoices, PO-based ordering and procurement-friendly documentation for corporate, school, college and government trophy and award orders. Pan-India delivery from Bangalore.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy provides GST invoices and PO-based ordering on all B2B trophy and award orders, with documentation suited to corporate, institutional and government procurement. Delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: B2B buyers need clean paperwork. Every corporate order comes with a proper GST invoice, and we support purchase-order-based ordering, advance/credit terms by arrangement, and the tender-style documentation that schools, colleges, PSUs and government departments require. One point of contact handles your spec, proof, invoice and delivery.

settings.title: Proper GST invoices
settings.text: Compliant invoicing on every B2B order.

settings.title: PO-based ordering
settings.text: We accept and process purchase orders.

settings.title: Procurement-friendly
settings.text: Documentation for institutional and government buyers.

settings.title: Single point of contact
settings.text: One owner for spec, proof, invoice and delivery.

settings.title: Tell us what you need
settings.text: WhatsApp, call or fill the form with occasion, quantity, material and date.

settings.title: Get options & a quote
settings.text: We share designs, matching past work and a clear quote — usually same day.

settings.title: Approve proof & advance
settings.text: Sign off a digital mockup; 50% advance via UPI/transfer/card with GST invoice.

settings.title: Made & dispatched
settings.text: Crafted in our Bangalore workshop, QC'd and tracked to your venue.

settings.question: Do you provide GST invoices?
settings.answer: Yes — a compliant GST invoice on every B2B order.

settings.question: Can you work against a purchase order?
settings.answer: Yes — send your PO and we'll process the order against it.

settings.question: Do you handle government/tender documentation?
settings.answer: Yes — we regularly supply PSUs and government departments with the documentation they need.

settings.question: Do you offer credit terms?
settings.answer: Advance/credit terms can be arranged for established corporate accounts.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
